report_name: Critical Flaw in Cline AI Agent Lets Any Website Hijack Developer Workspaces

attack_patterns.name: Drive-by Compromise
attack_patterns.description: A malicious website could exploit the vulnerability in the Cline AI agent simply by being visited by a developer in their browser, allowing for silent session hijacking.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: A malicious website exploited the Cline agent's local Kanban server, which was listening on localhost and lacked proper origin validation for WebSocket connections.

attack_patterns.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
attack_patterns.description: Attackers could use the hijacked WebSocket connection to send commands to the agent's built-in terminal, which would then execute them on the developer's machine with the user's privileges.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Local System
attack_patterns.description: The attacker could receive a full snapshot of the developer's workspace, including all open files, source code, and AI chat history, leading to intellectual property theft.

tools.name: Cline AI coding agent
tools.description: A popular open-source AI coding agent which contained a critical WebSocket hijacking vulnerability in versions prior to 0.1.66, allowing for remote code execution and data theft.

vulnerabilities.name: WebSocket Hijacking in Cline AI Coding Agent
vulnerabilities.description: A critical vulnerability in the Cline AI coding agent's local Kanban server where WebSocket connections lacked proper origin validation, allowing any website to silently connect, hijack the session, exfiltrate data, and execute arbitrary commands.
affected_products: Cline AI coding agent versions prior to 0.1.66

identities.name: Developers
identities.description: Users of the Cline AI coding agent who were vulnerable to WebSocket hijacking, remote code execution, and data theft due to the flaw in the agent.

infrastructure.name: Malicious Website for Cline Hijacking
infrastructure.description: A malicious website that, when visited by a developer, exploits the WebSocket hijacking vulnerability in the Cline AI agent to take control of the developer's workspace and execute commands.

indicators.name: Cline Agent Spawning Suspicious Child Process
indicators.pattern:
title: Cline Agent Spawning Suspicious Child Process
id: 2b8c5a1f-3d9e-4b7c-8a1d-9f6e0c4b2a1e
status: experimental
description: Detects the Cline AI agent process spawning suspicious child processes such as shells or networking tools, which could indicate exploitation of the WebSocket hijacking vulnerability for RCE.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/11th-may-threat-intelligence-report/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-11
tags:
  - attack.t1059
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\cline.exe'
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\wget.exe'
      - '\bash.exe'
      - '\sh.exe'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate use of the integrated terminal by a developer.
indicators.description: Detects the Cline AI agent process spawning suspicious child processes like shells or networking tools, which could indicate exploitation for remote code execution.

indicators.name: Browser Process Connecting to Localhost WebSocket
indicators.pattern:
title: Browser Process Connecting to Localhost WebSocket
id: 8e4d2c1a-9b3f-4e6d-8c5a-1b9f0d3a2c4e
status: experimental
description: Detects a web browser process initiating a network connection to localhost, which could indicate an attempt to exploit a local server vulnerability like the Cline AI agent WebSocket hijacking flaw.
references:
  - https://research.checkpoint.com/2026/11th-may-threat-intelligence-report/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-11
tags:
  - attack.t1189
  - attack.t1190
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    SourceImage|endswith:
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
    DestinationIp: '127.0.0.1'
    Initiated: true
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate local development tools that use WebSockets for communication with a browser.
  - Certain browser extensions.
indicators.description: Detects a web browser process initiating a network connection to localhost, which could indicate an attempt to exploit a local server vulnerability like the Cline AI agent flaw.

relationships.target_name: WebSocket Hijacking in Cline AI Coding Agent
WebSocket Hijacking in Cline AI Coding Agent

relationships.source_name: Browser Process Connecting to Localhost WebSocket
Cline Agent Spawning Suspicious Child Process
